chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 1010 of 2017 Date Order with Signature of Judge(s) Hearing of case 1. For hearing of CMA No.5343/2017 2. For hearing of CMA No.5344/2017 3. For hearing of main case 13-05-2025 None present. Petition is pending since 2017 without any progress. Petitioner remains unrepresented without any intimation or justification. Petition is dismissed for non-prosecution. Judge Judge Ayaz Gul
